1.title: Description
1.content: The cane easel is used for marking the center of the cane and providing support when shaving the end of the cane.

2.title: Build Guide
2.content: Bill of Materials . Printed Parts . | Easel body $\times$ 1 | Easel lid $\times$ 2 | . Printing the Parts . Generating 3D Files . | Source | Description | . | GitHub Repository | Generate the 3D file from cane-easel.scad. | . | MakerWorld Global | Generate the 3D file on MakerWorld Global webpage. | . | MakerWorld CN | Generate the 3D file on MakerWorld CN webpage. | . Customization . The cane easel is fully parametric and can be customized by modifying the parameters in cane-easel.scad. You can edit them to fit different instruments. Reference parameters for oboe and English horn are given below. | Instrument | Easel Length | Easel Diameter | . | Oboe | 76mm | 10.0mm | . | English Horn | 93mm | 13.7mm | . Printing Tips . | Use a layer height lower than 0.12mm to make sure the screw fits well. | . Assembly . Simply screw the two easel lids onto each side of the easel body.

11.title: 简介
11.content: 哨片中分器用于标记苇片的中心线，并在刮削苇片末端时提供支撑。 .

12.title: 制作指南
12.content: 物料清单 . 打印零件 . | 中分器主体 $\times$ 1 | 中分器侧盖 $\times$ 2 | . 打印零件 . 生成 3D 文件 . | 来源 | 说明 | . | GitHub 仓库 | 从 cane-easel.scad 生成 3D 文件。 | . | MakerWorld 全球站 | 在 MakerWorld 全球站网页上生成 3D 文件。 | . | MakerWorld 中国站 | 在 MakerWorld 中国站网页上生成 3D 文件。 | . 定制 . 苇片中分器完全参数化，可以通过修改 cane-easel.scad 中的参数进行定制。 您可以编辑参数以适应不同的船型苇片。 以下是双簧管和英国管的参考参数。 . | 乐器 | 中分器长度 | 中分器直径 | . | 双簧管 | 76mm | 10.0mm | . | 英国管 | 93mm | 13.7mm | . 打印建议 . | 使用低于 0.12mm 的层高，以确保螺纹配合良好。 | . 组装 . 将两个中分器侧盖分别旋入中分器主体的两端即可。 .

27.title: 关于我们
27.content: OpenReed 是一个开源项目，专注于为双簧乐器（双簧管、英国管、巴松管）提供 3D 打印的工具、机器和配件，强调易获取性和低成本。 . 项目目标 . | 易获取：让双簧乐器学习者和演奏者都能轻松获得所需工具 | 低成本：通过 3D 打印部件与标准五金件相结合，最大程度降低成本 | 开源共享：为双簧乐器社区自由分享设计与知识 | . 设计理念 . | 开源：所有设计均使用开源工具创建，并向社区公开分享。 | 脚本驱动：设计由代码定义而非手动 CAD 操作，实现可复现性和有效的版本控制。 | 参数化：模型使用可调参数构建，因此一个脚本可以为不同乐器、尺寸或打印机生成变体。 | . OpenReed 主要使用 OpenSCAD 和 Python 进行设计和开发。 .

28.title: 获取我们的产品
28.content: 您可以通过以下两种方式获取 OpenReed 产品： . | 自己动手制作：打印零件并自行组装产品。通过导航栏访问产品页面，按照制作指南操作。 . | 购买成品：从我们的店铺购买即用型产品。每一笔购买都有助于支持本项目 🤗。 . | .

33.title: About Us
33.content: OpenReed is an open-source initiative focused on 3D-printed tools, machines, and accessories for double reed instruments, emphasizing accessibility and affordability. Project Goals . | Accessibility: Make double reed tools easily available to learners and musicians | Affordability: Minimize costs by combining 3D-printed parts with standard hardware | Open Source: Freely share designs and knowledge for the benefit of the double reed community | . Design Philosophy . | Open-Source: Every design is created using open-source tools and shared openly with the community. | Script-Based: Designs are defined by code rather than manual CAD operations, enabling reproducibility and effective version control. | Parametric: Models are built with adjustable parameters, so one script can generate variants for different instruments, sizes, or printers. | . OpenReed primarily relies on OpenSCAD and Python for design and development.

34.title: Getting Our Products
34.content: You can obtain OpenReed products in one of two ways: . | Build It Yourself: Print the parts and assemble the product yourself. Visit the product pages through the navigation bar and follow the build guide. | Buy a Prebuilt Unit: Purchase a ready-to-use product from our stores. Every purchase helps support the project 🤗. | .

48.title: Description
48.content: The reed drying rack (or reed drying board) is designed for reed makers to place and dry wrapped blanks and scraped reeds. Variants . Recessed Reed Rack . The recessed reed rack holds reeds by recessed holes. This type of rack is easy to store and carry, but it does not support bassoon reeds. Protruding Reed Rack . The protruding reed rack holds reeds by their exposed staples. This design accommodates oboe, English horn, and bassoon reeds (internal staple parameters may differ); however, due to the inherent limitations of FDM (Fused Deposition Modeling) 3D printing, the staples may be more susceptible to breakage.

49.title: Build Guide
49.content: Bill of Materials . Printed Parts . | Reed drying rack $\times$ 1 | . Printing the Parts . Generating 3D Files . | Source | Description | . | GitHub Repository | Generate the 3D file from recessed-reed-rack.scad or protruding-reed-rack.scad. | . | MakerWorld Global | Generate the 3D file on MakerWorld Global webpage. | . | MakerWorld CN | Generate the 3D file on MakerWorld CN webpage. | . Printing Tips . | Use a large layer height for the protruding reed rack to strengthen the staple. | .

63.title: 简介
63.content: 哨片晾哨架（或称哨片晾哨板）专为哨片制作者设计，用于放置和晾干已绑好的和已刮削的哨片。 . 种类 . 内嵌式晾哨架 . 内嵌式晾哨架通过内嵌的哨座槽放置哨片。这种晾哨架便于存放和携带，但不支持巴松哨片。 . 伸出式晾哨架 . 伸出式晾哨架通过哨座锥固定哨片。这种设计兼容双簧管、英国管、巴松哨片（不同种类的哨片哨座参数可能不同），但受限于 FDM 3D 打印的特性，哨座锥可能容易断裂。 .

64.title: 制作指南
64.content: 物料清单 . 打印零件 . | 哨片晾哨架 $\times$ 1 | . 打印零件 . 生成 3D 文件 . | 来源 | 说明 | . | GitHub 仓库 | 从 recessed-reed-rack.scad 或 protruding-reed-rack.scad 生成 3D 文件。 | . | MakerWorld 全球站 | 在 MakerWorld 全球站网页上生成 3D 文件。 | . | MakerWorld 中国站 | 在 MakerWorld 中国站网页上生成 3D 文件。 | . 打印建议 . | 对于伸出式哨片架，使用较大的层高以加强插柱的强度。 | .
